d	Z	d
LONG_PASSWORDZ
FOUND_ROWSZ	LONG_FLAGZ
CONNECT_WITH_DBZ	NO_SCHEMAZ
COMPRESSZ
ODBCZ
LOCAL_FILESZ
IGNORE_SPACEZ
PROTOCOL_41Z
INTERACTIVEZ
SSLZ
IGNORE_SIGPIPEZ
TRANSACTIONSZ
SECURE_CONNECTIONZ
MULTI_STATEMENTSZ
MULTI_RESULTSZ
PS_MULTI_RESULTSZ
PLUGIN_AUTHZ
CONNECT_ATTRSZ
PLUGIN_AUTH_LENENC_CLIENT_DATAZ
CAPABILITIESZ
HANDLE_EXPIRED_PASSWORDSZ
SESSION_TRACKZ
DEPRECATE_EOF
</usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pymysql/constants/CLIENT.py
<module>
